reviews.comment:
Completo, tiene estacionamiento y sombra para descansar, precios razonables para estar en medio de la nada.

(Translated by Google)
Complete, has parking and shade to rest, reasonable prices for being in the middle of nowhere.

reviews.comment:
No entre pero cambio mucho desde la última vez que pase por ahí

(Translated by Google)
I didn't go in, but it's changed a lot since the last time I was there.

reviews.comment:
Buena atencion, tanto en la playa de expendio de combustible como en la confiteria. Un excelente lugar para in pequeño descanso en la larga ruta que une Trelew con Comodoro Rivadavia

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, both at the gas station and the café. A great place for a short break on the long road between Trelew and Comodoro Rivadavia.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12078125792324684984/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3aWVUUElBEAE

reviews.comment:
Cuando fuimos los baños estaban cerrados y no había agua. El resto ok.

(Translated by Google)
When we went, the bathrooms were closed and there was no water. Everything else was fine.
